title: Floral 1st Birthday Party Decorations for 20 Guests, Include Little Miss Onederful Paper Plates, Happy 1st Birthday Tablecloth, Napkins, 1st Birthday Supplies for Girls First Birthday Party Decor
features: 【Little Miss Onederful Party Decor】Includes 20 x 23cm dinner plates, 20 x 18cm dessert plates, 20 x napkins, 1 x onederful birthday tablecloth.

【Onederful 1st Birthday Design】Printed with the beautiful color, vivid flowers, and “Little Miss Onederful” “Happy Birthday” “1st” words. All of these can add a more birthday atmosphere to your party!

【Perfect for Girls First Birthday Party】These floral themed birthday decorations are very suitable to use at first birthday parties and suitable for indoor and outdoor use. On this important day, why not use these floral 1st birthday decorations to make your party more lovely and professional, it will create an essential and elegant atmosphere at your parties and leave great memories.

【Adorable Floral 1st Birthday Party Decor】All of this birthday party pack is a well-made, high-quality decor set that would display well on your little sweetie's birthday. This floral tableware set is made of food-grade paper material, which is oil-proof, won't fold or tear, and will not fade. The happy 1st birthday tablecloth is approx 220x130cm, and made of quality PE material, not easy to tear, waterproof, and stainproof.

【Enjoy the Little Miss Onederful Party】This flroal themed 1st birthday party decoration kit will help you complete the party decorations in a short time. Just spread the tablecloth on the table to protect your table from stains and scratches.
description: Includes 20 x 23cm dinner plates, 20 x 18cm dessert plates, 20 x napkins, 1 x onederful birthday tablecloth.
